args.query:
SELECT TRIM(BOTH '\n\t ' FROM o.OwnerId) AS AgentId,
       AVG(date_diff('day', CAST(TRIM(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE), CAST(TRIM(c.CompanySignedDate) AS DATE))) AS avg_days,
       COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM TRIM(o.ContractID__c)) = TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM TRIM(c.Id))
WHERE CAST(TRIM(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE) >= DATE '2023-04-01'
  AND CAST(TRIM(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE) < DATE '2023-05-01'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT TRIM(BOTH '\n\t ' FROM o.OwnerId) AS AgentId,
       AVG(date_diff('day', CAST(TRIM(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE), CAST(TRIM(c.CompanySignedDate) AS DATE))) AS avg_days,
       COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM TRIM(o.ContractID__c)) = TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM TRIM(c.Id))
WHERE CAST(TRIM(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE) >= DATE '2023-04-01'
  AND CAST(TRIM(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE) < DATE '2023-05-01'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
